title: zygia racemosa
intro: Zygia racemosa, also known as the Mexican copal tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Zygia racemosa include reducing inflammation, relieving respiratory issues, and aiding in the treatment of digestive problems. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
